flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Virginia Commonwealth University rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($15.3k → $16.9k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Virginia Commonwealth University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.9% → 0.0%).
